commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a config-validation helper, a doctor health contribution, and tests to warn when configured default or per-agent primary model refs are absent from the loaded model catalog.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection rather than a live run: current main structurally accepts configured model strings and lacks a generic doctor/config diagnostic for unknown default or per-agent model refs, while the PR defects are visible in the diff and surrounding catalog contracts.
commands.review_followup: Manual review is needed because the remaining blockers include contributor real behavior proof and catalog-authority/product semantics, not a safe autonomous repair lane for this external PR.

target.title: fix(config): warn when configured model primary is not in catalog
target.author: dsantoreis
